Vite Deployed to GitHub Pages but _plugin-vue_export-helper Returns 404

Vite builds and ships to GitHub Pages fine — but once you load the page, the dynamically imported _plugin-vue_export-helper module 404s and the page goes blank. This post walks through the actual cause (Rollup's filename sanitization producing a name GitHub Pages doesn't serve) and the vite.config.js tweak that fixes it.
VSCode 1.69 Broke `! + Tab`? Here's the Fix
After VSCode updated to 1.69, the classic `! + tab` HTML expansion stopped working. Here's how to get it back.
Docker `denied: requested access to the resource is denied` — How to Fix
Tried to docker push to Docker Hub and kept hitting 'denied: requested access to the resource is denied'? All the fixes — image naming, login state, and tag format.
Fixing Mac XAMPP Apache Won't Start
XAMPP is a great one-stop PHP local dev tool, but recently MySQL was starting fine while Apache Web Server just hung. This post is my notes on what was going wrong.
Mac "Port xxx is Already in Use" — How to Free It Up

Building a project locally and hitting "Port 5000 is already in use"? This post covers how to identify what's holding a port on Mac (lsof), how to kill it (kill PID), and the special case of macOS reserving port 5000 for AirPlay Receiver — including the exact System Settings toggle to free it.
Local Dev Hits "Failed to read localStorage: Access is denied" — Here' s the Fix

Hit a weird Chrome console error during local dev — "Uncaught DOMException: Failed to read the 'localStorage' property from 'Window': Access is denied for this document." Writing it down. Turns out Chrome's third-party cookie blocking is treating http://localhost:5500 as blocked. The fix is allowing the domain in Chrome's site settings — and as a bonus, the same setup works fine via 127.0.0.1:5500.
Setting the Server Timezone on Heroku

Heroku defaults to UTC for server time, which is fine for logs but wrong for any app that displays local-time-of-day to users. Fix it by setting the TZ environment variable to a tz database name (like Asia/Taipei or America/New_York). This post covers both routes — Heroku dashboard and the CLI.
`terminal.integrated.shell.osx` Is Deprecated in VSCode — Here's the New Way
VSCode deprecated `terminal.integrated.shell.osx`. Here's the new way to configure your default shell using profiles — plus a quick walkthrough on giving each profile its own icon.
Fixing GitHub's Download Button That Won't Respect Branch Selection
Lately GitHub's branch downloads have been ignoring which branch you've switched to. Here's how to fix it.
pyenv: `configure: error: C compiler cannot create executables` Fix
Quick note on how to fix `C compiler cannot create executables` when running pyenv install on macOS 11 (Big Sur).
